rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.039, which governs open meetings and open records requirements for the Department of Housing and Community Affairs.
quote: Sec. 2306.039. OPEN MEETINGS AND OPEN RECORDS.
_note: No conflict; the rule_text concerns open government provisions for a housing agency and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemption amounts.
